conservative.name: Bribery
conservative.requirements: You must engage the target in discreet conversation for a few minutes

success.description: You determine whether or not the target is willing to accept a bribe, and how much the bribe will cost you (usually measured in coins of the targets social tier). If the target is willing and you pay the requisite amount, influence the target. If the target is not willing, you successfully disengage from the conversation without actually offering the bribe

bane.description: You come off as uncouth and a little untrustworthy, add to your next Social action against he same target

chaosStar.description: "Are you offering me a bribe!?" If the check failed, the target knows you just tried to bribe him. If there are witnesses, things could get interesting...
